---
title: "Souvik Sarkar"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sounix000@gmail.com

---

Professionally, I am a technical writer with experience in docs-as-code workflows and open source environments. I write technical content for software engineers, dev-ops engineers, and system administrators.

Currently, I work as a Senior Technical Writer at SUSE. Prior to that, I worked at Red Hat, Fusioncharts (data visualization), and Ribbon Communications (telecom). In my early career, I worked as a web developer and software engineer for a few years.

As a hobby, I like solving puzzles and problems; the difficulty and satisfaction dervided from solving them is what makes my life exciting. Most of the posts in this blog are notes from my intellectual misadventures or side projects.

Okay, enough of bragging about myself. Here's the real me - I often zone out, day dream, procrastinate, and overthink. I prefer theory over practice, beautiful over useful, satire over directness, mountains over oceans, and tea over coffee.
